name: GTandDiedTooSoons Live 12 Foundation Template
target_runtime: Ableton Live 12 Suite with Max for Live
tuning: 12-TET with optional bluegrass fiddle/banjo pitch inflection automation

tracks.name: AeroBand Banjo Lead
tracks.instrument_strategy: Banjo-imitation rack using pluck envelope, resonator EQ, velocity layers, and MPE/pitch-bend articulation where available.

tracks.name: Fiddle / Hybrid Strings
tracks.instrument_strategy: Ableton String Quartet or Arturia Augmented STRINGS, layered with subtle pitch drift.

tracks.name: Mandolin Chop
tracks.instrument_strategy: Short plucked sampler/rack layer, high-mid transient emphasis, gated room.

tracks.name: Dobro / Metallic Slide
tracks.instrument_strategy: Resonator-like slide layer or guitar-source Arturia bank routed through granular delay.

tracks.name: Acoustic Guitar Boom-Chuck
tracks.role: Bluegrass rhythm bed and punk strum anchor
tracks.instrument_strategy: Steel-string guitar rack or verified Arturia guitar-source patch with tight low-mid control and transient-preserved strums.

tracks.name: Upright Bass / Sub
tracks.role: Bluegrass root movement fused with deep-house low end
tracks.instrument_strategy: Layer upright-like transient with sine/triangle sub; sidechain from kick.

tracks.name: Punk Kit
tracks.instrument_strategy: Dry acoustic kit, parallel saturation, short room.

tracks.name: Deep House Machines
tracks.role: Kick, hats, stabs, and dance-floor continuity
tracks.instrument_strategy: Classic drum-machine racks, 303/101-style bass or stabs, restrained sidechain.

tracks.name: Public Domain Source Deck
tracks.instrument_strategy: Sampler or Simpler loaded from provenance-checked local source folder.

tracks.name: Alien Sky
tracks.instrument_strategy: Granulator III, Inspired by Nature, PitchLoop89, spectral/freeform processing.
